title: Creamy Sauteed Jamaican Parsley Stir-fry
description: A creamy and fermented jamaican dish featuring freshly chopped parsley, sauteed in a dairy-free-friendly sauce for a solo-dinner option.

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon ground turmeric
ingredients.notes: For a hint of earthiness and color.

ingredients.name: 3 cups water (or more as needed for consistency)

instructions: Bring water to a boil in a medium saucepan.
Add minced garlic, nutritional yeast, tahini, apple cider vinegar, smoked paprika, and turmeric. Stir continuously until the mixture reaches desired thickness (like creamy dressing).
Reduce heat to low and let simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in fresh parsley and continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes or until wilted but still crisp.
Remove from heat and serve immediately over rice, quinoa, or as a side dish with fish or tofu.
